Typedefs | Functions
strings.h File Reference

Typed list of C strings. More...

#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include "list.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t strings_t
 List of C strings (char pointers).
 

Functions

static strings_t * strings_new (size_t size)
 Allocate a new strings list.
 
static void strings_free (strings_t *strings, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free a strings list and optionally each string.
 
static bool strings_add (strings_t *strings, char *string)
 Append a string to the list.
 
static char * strings_get (const strings_t *strings, size_t index)
 Retrieve a string by index.
 
static size_t strings_size (const strings_t *strings)
 Return the current number of strings.
 
static size_t strings_capacity (const strings_t *strings)
 Return the allocated capacity.
 
static bool strings_empty (const strings_t *strings)
 Check whether the list is empty.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides strings_t (a list_t specialization) together with creation, access and query helpers for managing collections of null-terminated C strings.

Function Documentation

◆ strings_add()

static bool strings_add ( strings_t * strings,
char * string )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in,out]stringsPointer to the list.
[in]stringNull-terminated string to add (pointer is stored, not copied).
Returns
true on success.

inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]stringsPointer to the list.
Returns
Capacity.

static bool strings_empty ( const strings_t * strings)
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]stringsPointer to the list.
Returns
true if the list contains no items.

◆ strings_free()

static void strings_free ( strings_t * strings,
void(* free_func )(void *) )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]stringsPointer to the list.
[in]free_funcPer-item destructor (may be NULL).

static char * strings_get ( const strings_t * strings,
size_t index )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]stringsPointer to the list.
[in]indexZero-based index.
Returns
The stored string pointer.

inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]sizeInitial capacity.
Returns
Pointer to the new list, or NULL on failure.
